name: com.kudos.network
description: Bespoke P2P networking SDK for the Kudos social VR platform. WebRTC transport (Windows/macOS/Quest/WebGL), distributed authority, fill-or-create rooms, host migration, reconnect grace, interest management, moderation, integrated spatial VOIP.

samples.description: Seven annotated scripts covering the three core patterns: connection bootstrap, synced door, chat, grabbables, nameplates, host spawning, voice mute.
